expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to Mode 2 (Profile) based on 'profile' keyword
Agent runs profile-parser.py script with --input flag
Agent identifies top hotspot functions from parsed output
Agent categorizes functions as CPU-bound, I/O-bound, or overhead
Agent provides root cause hypothesis with evidence from profiler data
Agent recommends optimization approaches with expected impact and trade-offs
Agent cites specific profiler data points, not general principles
